meaning: and the ones who line up
and the female ones who drive away
And the female ones who follow/recite
and a protection (being used as object)
any extremely rebellious one (being protected against)
they try very hard to hear (to the highest assembly)
with forceful repelling (describing how they are driven away)
and so he pursued him (referring to whoever snatched something in the previous part of the verse)
dust (as the thing being acted upon)
a single shout/cry (that will resurrect everyone)
you all were (referring to those who used to deny this Day of Judgment)
and stop them! (command to many people)
what (is wrong with you that you do not help each other?)
those who are seeking to submit
and he came forward (to speak to others)
they ask/are asking one another (in this ayah: turning to each other asking)
they said (to those they are addressing)
indeed you all (being addressed by others)
you (all) come to us (addressing those who used to mislead)
they said (speaking to their followers on the Day of Judgment)
from (emphasizing we had no authority over you)
you all were (addressing the disbelievers in the ayah)
so we led you all astray
so indeed they (are the ones who will share in the punishment)
those who share together (in the punishment)
except (what comes after this word limits what came before it)
a provision (something that will be given as sustenance)
they are being drained/exhausted (referring to the people of Paradise)
ones with large and beautiful eyes (describing the companions of Paradise)
they ask one another (about their past lives)
from them (referring to the companions in paradise speaking about their former companions)
Is it true that we...? (expressing doubt)
you all (when speaking to a group)
surely you would have destroyed me
and if not for (connects to previous statement)
except (what follows is excluded from what was mentioned before)
among those who are being severely punished
this (pointing to something in the ayah)
as a special provision (for the people of Paradise)
so indeed they (are the ones who will be eating)
so they are filling (their stomachs from it)
from it (referring to the tree/food mentioned earlier)
upon it/her (referring to the drink mentioned earlier in the verse)
indeed they (emphasizes the statement about them finding their fathers)
they found (referring to the disbelievers finding their forefathers)
and so they (rushing on their footsteps)
in them (referring to those who received warners)
the Great One (describing the distress/trial mentioned before)
you (all) worship (addressing the people in the ayah)
and then they turned themselves away
away from him (referring to the one they turned away from)
what (is wrong with you that you do not speak?)
do you (all) worship? (Ibrahim questioning his people)
so we made them (the lowest ones)
so we gave him good news
with him (referring to his son who reached the age of working)
I will slaughter you (what Ibrahim sees in his dream)
what (asking about what Ibrahim sees in his dream)
the ones who excel in doing good
the later ones (referring to future generations)
like that (referring to what was mentioned before)
and we gave him good news
with Isaac (as the good news given to him)
a doer of good (describing their descendants)
and we saved them both intensively
and we gave to both of them
and we guided both of them
so they intensely denied him (referring to the messenger mentioned before)
surely they will be brought forth
those who enter morning time (with emphasis)
and then he participated in casting lots
so we let them enjoy thoroughly
or (connecting to previous statement with doubt/question)
we created (referring to Allah using the royal 'We')
witnesses (they were present when it happened)
Then do you not...? (connecting negative question)
completely perfect and free from all faults
you all (when talking to a group)
except (those who will enter the Fire)
he/it (referring to the one who will enter the blazing fire)
a standing place (referring to each angel's assigned station)
the ones who line up (in rows)
and if (connects this condition to previous statements)
that (emphasizing what follows is definitely true)
and indeed (connects to previous statement while emphasizing what follows)
is it by our punishment that (they hasten)?
they seek to hurry (referring to the disbelievers asking for Allah's punishment to come quickly)
the warned ones (referring to specific people who were warned)
they describe (referring to those who attribute false things to Allah)
